manifest.author: iamzainnnn
manifest.changelog:
V35 — Changelogs

🆕 Added / Enabled

- Now you can send Stories to DMs by long-pressing the ⌲ icon.
- Saved content is now accessible directly from DMs.
- Enabled Multiple Notes support (not functional yet).
- Brought back voice and media replies while responding to messages.
- Enabled animated themes for eligible accounts.
- Reintroduced voice and selfie replies on Stories.
- You can now share voice messages from DMs to Stories.
- Enabled more layouts for the Homecoming experience.
- Introduced Instants Recap formats. (You can now share your Instants recaps to Stories.)
- Enabled profile music highlights.
- Increased the limit for pinned posts for eligible/subscribed accounts.
- Added support for custom fonts in Stories, Bio, and Chat for eligible accounts.

🔄 Updated / Improved

- Updated the Stories viewer list.
- Redesigned several UI elements across the app.
- Updated the Instagram logo.
- Improved Stories viewer animations and transitions.
- Enhanced Stories blur effects and visual polish.
- Improved Reels audio playback stability.
- Refined Homecoming layout behavior and navigation.
- Improved feed and sharing interactions across multiple surfaces.
- Improved Stories creation and sharing experience with additional editing tools and enhancements.
- Improved Direct connectivity and message delivery reliability.
- Refined Reels viewer controls and playback interactions.
- Enhanced profile customization options for eligible accounts.
- Improved notification accuracy and badge synchronization.
- New animation while swiping through Instants.

🪄 Restored

- Restored the ability to reply to liked and reshared-by-friends bubbles.

🛠 Fixed

- Fixed glitches while opening the Stories viewer.
- Fixed video zoom issues in the feed viewer.
- Fixed several bottom sheet and viewer-related issues.
- Applied multiple reliability, memory leak, and stability fixes across Reels, Stories, DMs, and media components.

🚫 Removed

- Removed unnecessary midcards from Stories.
manifest.name: Zain's Backup
manifest.description: This backup maked for the newest features!
